CustomField.description: BIZ-81529 - Captures the Bill-To Account sourced from the related Quote (SBQQ__Quote__c.Bill_To_Account__c) for use in the SFDC > OP4I integration.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Bill-To Account sourced from the primary Quote. Used by the OP4I integration to sync the Bill-To entity on the Deal.
CustomField.label: Bill To Account
